title: BEEWAY Hot Gun Sticks Φ 7.0mm, 50 Pack 7mm x 100mm Hot Glue Gun Sticks for Glue Guns, SGS Approved
features: HIGH QUALITY & CHILD-SAFE MATERIAL - The Beeway hot glue sticks are made of environmentally friendly, non-toxic and high-quality resin and EVA materials to ensure that no harmful substances will be produced during operation.
SUPER STRONG & FAST BONDING - With a viscosity of 9000±500 mPpas@180°C, these hot glue sticks can bond to almost all materials in just 30 seconds.

MULTI-TEMP COMPATIBLE - The hot glue sticks are versatile and can be used with high, low, dual, and multi-temperature hot glue guns. They are suitable for bonding delicate materials such as paper, lace, and fabric with low-temperature glue guns, as well as porous and heavier materials like glass and metal with high-temperature glue guns.

VERSATILE APPLICATION - The BEEWAY hot glue sticks bond to almost all materials, such as paper, metal, plastic, wood, fabric, ceramic, foam, lace, ribbon, synthetic fabric, and more. They are perfect for home, office, or school use, and are ideal for scrapbooking, crafting, DIY projects, and school assignments.

50 HOT GLUE STICKS INCLUDED - Comes with Φ 7.0mm x 100mm in length - 50 pieces, which are compatible with almost all common 15W-40W smalll hot glue guns on the market. 📐 Before making your purchase, please ensure that your glue gun is compatible with 7mm±0.2 diameter glue sticks to guarantee a proper fit.
description: Product Description HIGH QUALITY & CHILD-SAFE MATERIAL - Made of high-quality resin and EVA materials - Ensure that no harmful substances will be produced during operation SUPER STRONG & FAST BONDING - Viscosity of 9000±500 mPpas@180°C, can bond to almost all materials in just 30 seconds - Flexible and durable VERSATILE APPLICATION - Bond to almost all materials, such as paper, metal, plastic, wood, fabric, ceramic, foam, lace, ribbon, synthetic fabric, and more - Perfect for home, office, or school use - Ideal for scrapbooking, crafting, DIY projects, and school assignments How to Use 1. Insert the glue stick from the back of the glue gun (Glue gun not included) 2. Plug in to preheat for 3-5 minutes 3. Pulling trigger to use 4. If the glue stick can't be used up in one time, leave the remaining glue stick in the gun Packing List 50x Beeway Glue Sticks (7mmx100mm) Before making your purchase, please ensure that your glue gun is compatible with 7mm±0.2 diameter glue sticks for a proper fit. Specifications Material: Resin, EVA Softening Point: 73°C±5 Viscosity: -160°C - 12000±1000 mPpas -180°C - 9000±500 mPpas Working Temperature: 120°C - 180°C Color: Transparent White Diameter: 7.0mm±0.2 Length: 100mm CAUTION! - To be used under the direct supervision of an adult - Do NOT touch the the melted glue while in use - Keep away from ignition sources, heat
